prompt: An aerial view of a dense ancient rainforest, exactly half lush and alive with rich green canopy, mist and golden light — the other half abruptly replaced by bare scorched black earth, dead tree stumps and ash, the boundary between life and devastation razor sharp and violent. Golden hour light on the living side, cold darkness on the dead side. Cinematic, photorealistic, 8K, no text, no people, no labels.
dataset_name: Global Forest Watch - Primary Forest Loss
insight: Complex, irreplaceable histories that took millennia to build are being rapidly wiped blank, leaving behind sterile emptiness.
